title: covid 19 / liquidity facilities / fed response | Research Paper | New York Fed Releases Report on Policy Actions in Response t...
summary: The New York Fed released a special issue of its Economic Policy Review documenting the Federal Reserve's COVID-19 pandemic response, covering 10 distinct liquidity facilities and emergency programs including the CPFF, MMLF, PDCF, Corporate Credit Facilities, Main Street Lending Program, and Market Functioning Purchases. The volume comprises research articles assessing facility design, operational details, and market impact assessments developed from a September 2021 conference.
